examples: This building is one of the greatest pieces of glasswork ever created.

The effect of all this bravura glasswork is, predictably, a constrained outward view for the driver.
While she is best known for her glasswork, especially her minimalist light fixtures, she has long defied easy categorization, specializing in several mediums.
